serviceNotes.engine oil: Subaru Europe states routine servicing every 12 months or 15,000 km (whichever comes first). Subaru of North America’s model-year maintenance summaries for BRZ often specify 6,000 mi / 6 months (~9,650 km / 6 months) — follow the warranty and maintenance booklet for your market.
serviceNotes.interior ventilation filter: Replace cadence between annual inspections is not always printed as a fixed km interval in older booklets; 30,000 km / 24 months matches typical Subaru cabin-filter practice (see also Subaru-BRZ-FA24 note pattern).
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Subaru of North America maintenance schedule for BRZ lists air cleaner element replacement at 24 months / 24,000 miles (converted to ~38,500 km / 24 months).
serviceNotes.spark plugs: North American BRZ maintenance booklets commonly specify spark plug replacement at 60,000 miles for this engine (~96,500 km); the generic 2017 Subaru 24,000-mile spark line in some pamphlets does not match BRZ iridium service in dealer booklets — 60,000-mile specification is used here.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Subaru of North America: replace brake fluid every 24 months regardless of mileage (see maintenance schedule footnotes for BRZ).
serviceNotes.inspect disc brake pads: Inspect at least on each normal scheduled service visit (aligned with 15,000 km / 12 month European service rhythm).
serviceNotes.fuel filter: Subaru of North America: fuel filter replacement for BRZ at 48 months / 48,000 miles (~77,000 km / 48 months).
serviceNotes.rear differential oil: Subaru of North America: rear differential gear oil replacement for BRZ at 48 months / 48,000 miles (~77,000 km / 48 months).
serviceNotes.manual transmission oil: Subaru of North America lists transmission gear oil replacement for BRZ (manual gearbox) at 48 months / 48,000 miles (~77,000 km / 48 months).
serviceNotes.coolant: Interval inherited from Subaru-BRZ-FA24 (120,000 km / 96 months) — not independently verified against a first-gen BRZ EU booklet in this file; confirm in your owner’s manual.
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: Subaru of North America schedule lists automatic transmission fluid inspect (I) for BRZ at 48 months / 48,000 miles; many owners exchange fluid at the same milestone when towing or tracking — treat as preventive when fluid is dark.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.subaru.eu/service — correct service intervals: 12 months or 15,000 km (whichever comes first). https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — North America: engine oil & filter every 6 months / 6,000 miles for reference.
serviceSources.interior ventilation filter: https://www.subaru.eu/service — follow owner’s manual for itemised work; 30,000 km / 24 months replacement cadence between inspections (Subaru cabin filter practice; compare Subaru-BRZ-FA24).
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — 2017 Subaru maintenance recommendations: air cleaner element replace at 24 months / 24,000 miles (converted to kilometres).
serviceSources.spark plugs: https://www.kbb.com/subaru/brz/2018/spark-plug-replacement/ — scheduled spark plug replacement interval for Subaru BRZ (North American specification, ~60,000 miles / ~96,500 km for FA20).
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — brake fluid replace every 24 months; also listed at 24 months / 24,000 miles in scheduled table.
serviceSources.inspect disc brake pads: https://www.subaru.eu/service — steering, brakes and other items per owner’s manual at each scheduled service; 15,000 km / 12 months inspection cadence matches European service interval.
serviceSources.fuel filter: https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — fuel filter replace at 48 months / 48,000 miles; BRZ row in North American maintenance schedule.
serviceSources.rear differential oil: https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — rear differential gear oil (BRZ) replace at 48 months / 48,000 miles.
serviceSources.manual transmission oil: https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — transmission gear oil (BRZ) replace at 48 months / 48,000 miles.
serviceSources.coolant: Inherited: Subaru-BRZ-FA24 — https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf (same FA-family cooling system practice until owner supplies first-gen BRZ EU coolant row).
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — ATF (BRZ) inspect at 48 months / 48,000 miles; fluid exchange at same km when condition warrants (independent preventive guidance).
